functions.name: gossip.set_exception_policy
documentation:
This is a shortcut to calling {func}`gossip.group.Group.set_exception_policy` on the global
hook group

functions.name: gossip.not_now
documentation:
Defers execution of the current handler to later, after other handlers have been called.

This is useful for depending on other hook handlers

functions.name: gossip.wait_for
documentation: Defers execution of the current handler (see {func}`not_now`) if `cond` is False-y.

classes.name: gossip.blueprint.Blueprint

methods.name: gossip.blueprint.Blueprint.register
documentation:
Registers a function to this blueprint

:::{seealso}
{func}`gossip.register`
:::

methods.name: gossip.blueprint.Blueprint.install
documentation: Installs the blueprint, registering all of its handlers to their respective hooks

methods.name: gossip.blueprint.Blueprint.uninstall
documentation: Uninstalls the blueprint, unregistering all of its hooks

Represents a hook blueprint

Blueprints are sets of hooks that can be registered or unregistered with a single operation.

documentation: Gets the global (or root) group

functions.name: gossip.groups.get_groups
documentation: Gets all defined groups (including the global group)

functions.name: gossip.groups.get_or_create_group
documentation: Tries to retrieve an existing group, and if it doesn't exist, create a new group

functions.name: gossip.groups.get_group
documentation:
Returns an existing group with a given name

:raises: KeyError if no such group exists

functions.name: gossip.groups.create_group
documentation:
Creates and returns a new named group

```
rtype

```

functions.name: gossip.groups.unregister_token
documentation: Shortcut for {func}`gossip.groups.Group.unregister_token` on the global group

methods.name: gossip.groups.Group.set_unconstrained_handler_priority
documentation:
Controls when handlers without needs/provides specifications should be fired
relative to handlers with needs/provides.

```
param priority

gossip.FIRST means that unconstrained handlers should be fired first, gossip.LAST means last
```

methods.name: gossip.groups.Group.set_strict
documentation:
Marks this group as a strict group, meaning all hooks registered must be defined in advance

```
param strict

controls whether or not this group should be turned to strict
```

methods.name: gossip.groups.Group.unregister_token
documentation: Unregisters all handlers that were registered with `token` in this group

methods.name: gossip.groups.Group.set_exception_policy
documentation: Determines how exceptions are handled by hooks in this group

methods.name: gossip.groups.Group.get_exception_policy
documentation: Returns the current exception policy to be used by this group

functions.name: gossip.hooks.trigger
documentation: Triggers a hook by name, causing all of its handlers to be called

functions.name: gossip.hooks.trigger_with_tags
documentation:
Triggers a hook by name, specifying the tags to use when triggering.
If the hook receives keyword arguments, they have to be passed using the *kwargs* parameter, and not via
direct keyword arguments

functions.name: gossip.hooks.get_hook
documentation:
Gets a hook by its name

```
raises

 if the hook wasn't defined already
```

functions.name: gossip.hooks.create_hook
documentation: Creates a hook with the given full name, creating intermediate groups if necessary

functions.name: gossip.hooks.define
documentation:
Defines a new hook with the given name

```
returns

The  object created
```

functions.name: gossip.hooks.register
documentation:
Registers a new function to a hook

```
param hook_name

full name of hook to register to

param token

token to register with. This can be used to later unregister a group of handlers which have a
specific token

param needs

list of keywords (strings) that this registration needs, causing any hook that provides any of them to happen before this registration

param provides

list of keywords (strings) that this registration provides

param reentrent

specifies whether this hook can reenter (i.e. be called in recursion)

param toggles_on

specifies a toggle object to turn on when calling this registration. The registration will not be called if the toggle isn't off

param toggles_off

specifies a toggle object to turn off when calling this registration. The registration will not be called if the toggle isn't on

returns

The function (for decorator chaining)
```

functions.name: gossip.hooks.unregister_all
documentation: Unregisters all handlers from the given hook name

functions.name: gossip.hooks.registered
documentation:
Registers a new function to a hook on enter and unregister it on exit.

```
param hook_name

full name of hook to register to

param func

function to call when the hook is triggered

param kwargs

additional parameters which Hook.register can receives
```

functions.name: gossip.hooks.mute_context
documentation:
A context manager, during the execution of which the specified hook names will be ignored. Any code that tries to
trigger these hooks will trigger no callback.

```
type hook_names

list, tuple or generator of full hook names to mute
```

methods.name: gossip.hooks.Hook.register
documentation: Registers a new handler to this hook
